findings.title: 제품이 아직 없다

evidence.note: native provider stream wired to the chat product path
first-chat SQLite persistence and restart recovery landed
product chat surface consumes the native stream

findings.remaining: A first-chat vertical slice exists, but import, assets, backup, release operation, and broad product workflows are not launch-complete.

findings.title: 출시 후보가 Draft PR 스택에만 있다

evidence.note: current work is still on agent/m1-product-script-contract rather than the default branch

findings.remaining: Review, merge to the protected default branch, and establish a signed release tag.

findings.title: 실기기·성능 증거가 거의 없다

evidence.note: the repository matrix distinguishes compile, simulator, emulator, and physical-device evidence

findings.remaining: Collect physical five-OS evidence and raw p50/p95/p99 resource measurements.

findings.title: Channel ACK가 영원히 오지 않으면 영구 정지한다

evidence.note: 30-second ACK timeout, 128-request admission, and five-minute terminal retention are now explicit
product-native ACK, cancel, terminal snapshot, and cleanup path landed

findings.remaining: Owner-window cleanup, total in-flight byte accounting, and 128-dead-request then 129th-request chaos evidence remain.

findings.title: 제품 데이터 내구성 경로가 없다

evidence.note: chat, message, request state, checkpoint, terminal transition, and restart interruption recovery landed
strict v1 product schema and FTS are present
stream checkpoint and terminal transition tests are present

findings.remaining: Disk-full, WAL damage, migration chains, backup/restore, and asset transaction durability remain.

findings.title: 릴리스 파이프라인이 없다

evidence.note: verification and compile CI exists, but this is not a signed release-candidate pipeline

findings.remaining: Signing, notarization, AAB/archive/export, SBOM, provenance, update, and rollback workflows.

findings.title: 스토어·개인정보 기능이 미구현이다

evidence.note: imported executable content remains fail-closed

findings.remaining: In-app disclosure, privacy/support URLs, AI-output reporting, redacted diagnostics, and review notes.

findings.title: Android FileProvider 범위가 지나치게 넓다

evidence.note: external-path and cache-path still map path dot

findings.remaining: Limit mappings to app-owned import/share subdirectories or remove unused provider exposure.

findings.title: Android TV 런처가 의도치 않게 켜져 있다

evidence.note: LEANBACK_LAUNCHER remains present

findings.remaining: Remove the TV launcher and leanback feature unless TV becomes an explicit target.

findings.title: 스트림 처리 중 전체 문자열 복사가 반복된다

evidence.note: performance and allocation limits lack large-response benchmark evidence

findings.remaining: Incremental hashing, chunked frontend accumulation, frame-batched rendering, and large-message benchmarks.

findings.title: IPC 전송 중 async mutex를 잡고 있다

evidence.note: send_non_terminal currently invokes send_direct while the request machine mutex is held

findings.remaining: Reserve sequence under lock, release it before IPC send, then reconcile the result or move to a request actor.

findings.title: Delta 분할이 할당·직렬화를 반복한다

evidence.note: split_utf8 returns owned String fragments

findings.remaining: Linear byte-boundary splitting and one final serialization check with benchmark coverage.

findings.title: 임포트 스파이크는 대형 카드용 구현이 아니다

evidence.note: bounded safety spike exists outside the product workspace

findings.remaining: Streaming Content URI/file importer, staging object store, quota, free-space, and cancellation product path.

findings.title: 제품 DB 스키마가 10GB·수백만 턴을 위한 형태가 아니다

evidence.note: v1 supports linear first chat, not branch paths, render-cache separation, or 10GB proof

findings.remaining: Branch schema, keyset path loading, evictable render cache, completion-only FTS indexing, and large-data plan tests.

findings.title: WAL checkpoint starvation 대책이 제품에 없다

evidence.note: single-process lease exists, but WAL thresholds and reader-age observability do not

findings.remaining: Short read transactions, checkpoint policy, byte thresholds, reader-age telemetry, and starvation tests.

findings.title: “DB + assets 단일 zip” 백업은 10GB에서 위험하다
findings.remaining: No product backup path exists; implement an online DB snapshot plus streaming asset package and atomic publish.

findings.title: QuickJS 후보는 고정 corpus 증거이지 제품 성능 증거가 아니다

evidence.note: terminable Worker plus QuickJS candidate passed only its fixed corpus
product admission remains disabled by policy

findings.remaining: Keep Store-Safe off; physical, desktop, arbitrary-source, store-policy, and performance gates remain before any Advanced profile.

findings.title: Lua 50ms는 hard deadline이 아니다

evidence.note: the limitation belongs to a spike and is not a product hard-real-time guarantee

findings.remaining: Retain the no-host-callback restriction or use a separately terminable process if Lua is ever admitted.

goConditions.title: 제품 코드가 기본 브랜치에 병합되고 Draft 상태가 아님

evidence.note: not the default branch

goConditions.title: 실제 채팅 수직 경로와 최소 2개 provider가 동작

evidence.note: native provider stream product path exists; live-provider launch evidence is not recorded

goConditions.title: 앱 재시작·WebView 재로드·네트워크 중단 후 partial 복구

evidence.note: restart interruption recovery exists; reload and network-disconnect recovery are not proven

goConditions.title: ACK 미수신 요청이 TTL 뒤 정리되고 129번째 요청에서 정상 backpressure

evidence.note: ACK timeout and 128 admission cap exist; exact 129-request chaos proof remains

goConditions.title: 1M 메시지/10GB DB에서 일반 조작이 총 row 수에 비례해 느려지지 않음
100k~1M asset에서 시작 시 전체 directory scan 없음
디스크 부족·전원 차단·DB/WAL 손상 시 데이터 유실 규칙이 명확
모든 지원 OS 물리 기기 기능 셀에 증거 존재

evidence.note: physical-device matrix is incomplete

goConditions.title: imported JS/Lua OFF가 release binary에서 검증됨

evidence.note: built-boundary verifier exists; signed release artifact evidence does not
native credential vault boundary landed; full sentinel artifact scan remains

goConditions.title: Android FileProvider 범위 축소, 불필요한 TV 런처 제거

evidence.note: root mapping remains
LEANBACK_LAUNCHER remains

goConditions.title: 개인정보처리방침·지원 URL·AI 출력 신고 기능·심사 노트 준비
